payload.contentString:
Re-adjudication Request for Claim Invoice 73619
Patient: NALAH ALI - (MRN: 20431)
Visit Date: 2025-12-09 00:00:00
Diagnosis: J15-Bacterial pneumonia, not elsewhere classified

TARIFF ADJUSTMENT (2 line(s), total difference: 0.02 SAR):
  The rejected amounts represent rounding differences of 0.01 SAR per line item.
  Per the agreed tariff schedule between Hayat National Hospital-ABHA and
  Ministry of Health, these amounts are within the contractual tolerance.
  Request: Accept the claimed amounts as per the agreed tariff rates.
  - Seq 24: MOHS-B0679 Claimed=5141.61 Approved=5141.6 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 12: MOHS-B0679 Claimed=5141.61 Approved=5141.6 Diff=0.01

MEDICATION NOT REGISTERED (6 line(s)):
  The medications listed below were clinically necessary for patient care.
  These medications are approved by SFDA and were administered under physician
  supervision based on established clinical protocols.
  Request: Review and approve based on clinical necessity and SFDA registration status.
  - Seq 16: 99999999999999 - ZAVICEFTA 2 G/0.5 G VIAL (SAR 1361.25)
  - Seq 14: 99999999999999 - ZAVICEFTA 2 G/0.5 G VIAL (SAR 1361.25)
  - Seq 10: 99999999999999 - ZAVICEFTA 2 G/0.5 G VIAL (SAR 453.75)
  - Seq 8: 99999999999999 - ZAVICEFTA 2 G/0.5 G VIAL (SAR 453.75)
  - Seq 6: 99999999999999 - ZAVICEFTA 2 G/0.5 G VIAL (SAR 453.75)
  - Seq 2: 99999999999999 - ZAVICEFTA 2 G/0.5 G VIAL (SAR 453.75)

QUANTITY EXCEEDED (1 line(s)):
  The quantities billed reflect the actual services provided based on clinical need.
  Extended treatment was required due to patient condition complexity.
  Request: Review and approve the actual quantities administered.
  - Seq 4: MOHAPSB001 Qty=1 (SAR 347.78)

---
Total Claimed: 65208.44 SAR | Total Approved: 10283.2 SAR | Gap: 54925.24 SAR
Provider: Hayat National Hospital-ABHA
Policy Holder: MINISTRY OF HEALTH CASES
